series_metadata.series_title: Bureau of Infectious Diseases: Outbreak Reports
series_metadata.series_description: This series includes outbreak reports received by the Ohio Department of Health's Bureau of Infectious Diseases under Ohio Administrative Code 3701-3-02(C).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Data in the electronic database ODRS is retained until superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- destroy 6 months after entering information into the database. Destroy outbreak records that pre-date electronic database. ; Electronic: Data in the electronic database ODRS is retained until superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- destroy 6 months after entering information into the database. Destroy outbreak records that pre-date electronic database., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
